sql.title: SQL for Beginners
sql.description: Learn SQL from zero with hands-on practice.
sql.moreComingSoon: More SQL for Beginners lessons are coming soon.

sql_module_14.title: Relational Database Design for Beginners
sql_module_14.description: Strengthen the modeling side of SQL so learners understand why tables are shaped the way they are.
outcomes: Reduce duplication by separating repeated information.
Turn a real-world scenario into related tables.
why: Builds confidence with relational database design for beginners.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

section_14_1.title: Why Relationships Matter
section_14_1.description: Recognize how real-world relationships become one-to-one, one-to-many, and many-to-many database patterns.

section_14_2.title: Keys and Relationships
section_14_2.description: Review primary and foreign keys as the foundation for linking tables properly.

section_14_3.title: Good Beginner Design Habits
section_14_3.description: Build better table designs by reducing duplication, keeping tables focused, and planning for future queries.

section_14_4.title: Relational Design Practice
section_14_4.description: Turn real scenarios like stores, enrollments, and orders into beginner-friendly relational designs.
